15_ya_want_ta_start: Ya want ta start something with me?  Good.  I've been looking forward ta this.
17_im_good_with_daggers: I'm good with daggers.  Maybe someday I'll show you just how good I am.
18_whats_it_to_you: What's it to you?  My friends know me, and my enemies don't last too long.
19_i_dont_spread_rumors: I don't spread rumors.  I start them.
1_come_back_here_and: Come back here and let's settle this thing now.  I've been looking forward to this, coward, and I won't let you get away.
2_you_killed_me_i: You killed me.  I can't believe it....
3_gotcha_this_time_you: Gotcha!  This time, you don't get away from Bruno.  Ha, ha, ha.  You're dead meat.
4_gotcha_i_just_gave: Gotcha!  I just gave you a one-way trip to Hades for good, this time.  Tell 'em Bruno sent you!
5_i_aint_telling_you: I ain't telling you nothing.  Least I'll die knowing you're hosed.
6_when_you_die_and: When you die and go to Hades, tell 'em Bruno sent ya...
7_surprised_you_didnt_i: Surprised you, didn't I?  Let's just say I learned some new tricks.  Now you're going to die, and I get the pleasure of seeing you suffer. This one's for free.
8_man_i_shoulda_killed: Man, I shoulda killed you and Elsa both in Spielburg the first time.  You screwed me there.  This time, you're screwed.  Fair's fair.
9_under_the_bridge_dont: Under the bridge.  Don't forget to knock.
